title: melaleuca × mulleola
intro: Melaleuca × mulleola, also known as Cajeput or White Tea Tree, is a hybrid plant species between Melaleuca leucadendra and Melaleuca cajeputi, characterized by its small white flowers and aromatic leaves. The plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Melaleuca × mulleola include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and congestion, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Melaleuca × mulleola is commonly used in herbal preparations, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are used to promote relaxation, relieve stress, and support overall well-being.
